subcodes.first_line: O Tongue of Grandeur! Make mention of him who hath circled round Thy House and stood before all faces to serve Thy Cause, which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا لسان العظمة اذکر من طاف حول بیتک و قام امام الوجوه علی خدمة امرک الذی ما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
